tabs.content:
// 1. Create dim_date table
.create table dim_date (
    date_key: int,
    full_date: datetime,
    year: int,
    quarter: int,
    month: int,
    day: int,
    week_of_year: int,
    day_of_week: int,
    day_name: string,
    month_name: string,
    is_weekday: int
)

// 2. Create dim_facility table
.create table dim_facility (
    facility_key: long,
    facility_id: string,
    facility_name: string,
    facility_type: string,
    basin: string,
    operator: string,
    latitude: decimal,
    longitude: decimal,
    production_start_date: datetime,
    daily_oil_bbl: decimal,
    daily_gas_mcf: decimal,
    well_count: int,
    active_status: string,
    epa_facility_id: string,
    facility_age_days: int,
    facility_age_years: int,
    production_tier: string,
    daily_boe: real
)

// 3. Create dim_equipment table
.create table dim_equipment (
    equipment_key: long,
    equipment_id: string,
    facility_id: string,
    equipment_tag: string,
    equipment_type: string,
    manufacturer: string,
    model: string,
    install_date: datetime,
    last_maintenance_date: datetime,
    criticality: string,
    equipment_age_days: int,
    equipment_age_years: int,
    days_since_maintenance: int
)

// 4. Create gold_emission_events fact table
.create table gold_emission_events (
    event_id: string,
    date_key: int,
    event_date: datetime,
    detection_timestamp: datetime,
    facility_key: long,
    equipment_key: long,
    emission_kg_per_hour: decimal,
    emission_severity: string,
    duration_hours: real,
    total_methane_loss_mcf: real,
    financial_impact_usd: real,
    compliance_risk_score: int,
    scada_anomaly_detected: int,
    work_order_generated: string,
    detection_source: string,
    response_time_hours: real,
    distance_meters: real
)

// Check all tables in the database
.show tables
tabs.title: Tables creation

tabs.content:
.create materialized-view equipment_failures_mv
on table gold_emission_events
{
    gold_emission_events
    | where scada_anomaly_detected == 1
    | join kind=inner dim_equipment on equipment_key
    | summarize
        failure_count = count(),
        total_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
        avg_emission_rate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
        facilities_affected = dcount(facility_key)
        by
        equipment_type,
        manufacturer,
        criticality,
        equipment_id,
        equipment_key
}
tabs.title: GreenSky_Ontology
